title: AI/ML Engineer
company_focus:
Healthcare technology and services improving health outcomes
globally
description:
Requisition Number: 2331078 Optum is a global organization
that delivers care, aided by technology to help millions of
people live healthier lives. The work you do with our team
will directly improve health outcomes by connecting people
with the care, pharmacy benefits, data and resources they
need to feel their best. Here, you will find a culture
guided by diversity and inclusion, talented peers,
comprehensive benefits and career development opportunities.
Come make an impact on the communities we serve as you help
us advance health equity on a global scale. Join us to start
Caring. Connecting. Growing together. We are looking for a
Data Scientist to drive end-to-end ML and DL projects.
Primary Responsibility:

- Comply with the terms and conditions of the employment
  contract, company policies and procedures, and any and all
  directives (such as, but not limited to, transfer and/or
  re-assignment to different work locations, change in teams
  and/or work shifts, policies in regards to flexibility of
  work benefits and/or work environment, alternative work
  arrangements, and other decisions that may arise due to
  the changing business environment). The Company may adopt,
  vary or rescind these policies and directives in its
  absolute discretion and without any limitation (implied or
  otherwise) on its ability to do so

- Bachelor of Technology
- Minimum 6 - 10 Years of experience into AIML
- Knowledge of Large Language Models (LLMs) for text and
  conversational applications
- Familiarity with data cleaning, feature engineering, and
  model evaluation best practices
- Proficiency in Python, including libraries like pandas,
  NumPy, and scikit-learn
- Demonstrated ability to build, train, and optimize machine
  learning models for production
- Proven excellent analytical thinking and communication
  skills for cross-functional collaboration
- Preferred Qualifications:
- Hands-on experience with deep learning frameworks
  (TensorFlow/PyTorch)
- Experience using cloud platforms (AWS/GCP/Azure) for
  scalable deployments
- Exposure to Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG)
  methodologies and AI Agents
responsibilities: Drive end-to-end ML and DL projects from conception to production deployment
Perform data cleaning, feature engineering, and model evaluation following best practices
Build, train, and optimize machine learning models for production environments
Develop solutions using Large Language Models for text and conversational applications
Implement deep learning models using frameworks like TensorFlow and PyTorch
Deploy scalable ML solutions using cloud platforms (AWS/GCP/Azure)
Collaborate cross-functionally with teams to deliver data-driven solutions
Apply RAG methodologies and AI agent techniques where applicable
use_cases: Healthcare data analysis and predictive modeling
Text and conversational AI applications in healthcare context
Production ML systems for health outcomes improvement
Patient care optimization through data-driven insights
Health equity and access improvement initiatives
ai_classification_reasoning:
The role primarily focuses on building, training, and
optimizing traditional ML and DL models for production, with
LLMs mentioned as secondary knowledge. Core responsibilities
center on standard machine learning workflows (data
cleaning, feature engineering, model training) rather than
LLM/agent development as the primary function.
